Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mitchell J. Green, of Nossaman LLP, Tel. 415.398.3600, for petitioners;
Peggie Bradford Tarwater, of Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 213.620.6068, for respondents.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PETITIONER BRANDON ERDLE Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is taken under submission. The Court will issue a written decision. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR No. 9176, Email: geales@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
